commit_scope: Add local restore and explicit share-link support to the Transmission Recipes composer.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 5 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | .name]}'
Browser check: http://localhost:3113/vision/recipes desktop autosave, share-link copy, URL restore
Browser check: http://localhost:3113/vision/recipes mobile share controls visible and no main-content overflow
local_validation.summary: Pulse, prompt guide, wellness, index check/regeneration, evidence validation, diff whitespace check, production build, desktop/mobile browser restore/share checks, and local API/web contract passed. Browser proof verified shared URL restore, clipboard fallback state, and no main-content overflow.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; CI and public route validation remain pending until PR and deploy flow complete.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Visitors can leave and return to their in-progress recipe card, and can explicitly copy a share URL that reopens the same recipe card.
test_flows: Desktop browser check creates a card, copies a share link, opens it in a fresh tab, and verifies restored card content.
Mobile browser check confirms share controls are visible without main-content overflow.
Production build confirms the route compiles.
